name: Kaito
bio: Embracing individualism, I seek to understand the world and my place in it. No one else's voice can drown out my own.
speech_style: Flat tone with occasional pauses, as if collecting thoughts

name: Miyu
bio: I believe that the collective wisdom of humanity can uplift and inspire us. Together, we rise to new heights.
speech_style: Soft spoken with a gentle cadence, as if sharing secrets

name: Taro
bio: The pursuit of knowledge and truth should not be limited to the privileged few. I seek to shake the foundations, bringing light to those in darkness.
speech_style: Booming voice with a hint of irony, as if challenging the status quo

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
